seoTitle: Coomba Park vs Coombadjha — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coomba Park and Coombadjha. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coomba Park vs Coombadjha: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coomba Park and Coombadjha.
heading: Coomba Park vs Coombadjha — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coomba Park, New South Wales and Coombadjha, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coombadjha has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Coomba Park (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coomba Park or Coombadjha safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coomba Park has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Coombadjha scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coomba Park scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Coombadjha scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coomba Park or Coombadjha?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coombadjha has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
